• Interactive web page with a text input that replaces all instances of "C++" in a Linus Torvalds rant
  • Uses CSS for styling with a container, input field, and styled text replacement
  • JavaScript dynamically updates the text content of all ".replace" elements as the user types
    const inputField = document.getElementById('userInput');
    inputField.addEventListener('input', (event) => { ... });

This HTML page creates an interactive meme generator where users can replace all instances of "C++" in a famous Linus Torvalds rant with their own text. The page uses CSS for styling and JavaScript to dynamically update the text content of all ".replace" elements as the user types in the input field.
